titleStmt.title: SII 9.441: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 441. (A.R. No. 365 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE KUNDESVARA TEMPLE AT COONDAPUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1348, Viśvāvasu, Chaitra, śu. • • Maṁ[gaḷavāra], corresponding probably to A.D. 1425 March 27, Tuesday, in the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya (II). It records that Narasiṁhadēva-Voḍeya, who was governing the Bārakūra-rājya by the command of the king and, Hariyappa-Daṇṇāyaka-Voḍeya restored, without diminishing the revenue to the palace, the land, once granted by Dēvaṇṇa-Sēnabōva of Kuḍākūr for the service of the god Kundēśvara, after making a thorough inquiry among the inhabitants of Kundāpura who had assembled at his call.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ . śrīsarasvatyāyēnamaḥ śrīgurubhyō
śubhamastu . śrīkuṁdēśvarāya namaḥ . namastuṁgaśi
ṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśaka
varṣa 1347 saṁdu 8 neya viśvāvasuseṁvatsarada caitra su
maṁ śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru vijayānagaradalū
varṇāśramadharmaṁgaḷanū pratipālisuttiha kāladalū
śrīdēvarāyamahārāyaru hariyappadaṁṇayakavo
ḍeyara nirūpadiṁ bārakūra rājyavanu narasihvadēvavoḍeya
ru pratipālisuttiha kāladalū kuṁdāpurada voḷaga
ṇa kuṁdēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyalū pūrvadalū vūrujagattu
Addikadalū kuḍākūra dēvaṇṇasēnabōva māḍisida dhar(ṁ)
rmavū naḍeyadē yiralāgi Ā narasihvadēvavoḍeyaru
kuṁdāpuradoḷagaṇa grāmajagattu mukkālaṭṭigaḷanu
karasi vicārisi purōhitasthaḷavanaḷadā kuḷava kaṭṭi Ara
manege siddhāya naṣṭavilladē barici Ādhar(ṁ)mmada bhūmiyanū A
caṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi naḍeva dharmada bhūmiya vivara Ā Adhi
vāsada voḷage mūḍalu dēvara Amṛtapaḍiya vūraloḍekaḷa
ṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hebbāruvanalli Uḷḷūrugaḷa
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ersukāraṁtana gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ teṁkalu yi The rest is built in.
Digital edition of SII 9.441 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
